overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a character exploring a detailed gothic classroom with spiral staircases, tapestry-lined corridors, and ornate wooden interiors. The character traverses multiple connected spaces including a grand staircase, secondary corridors, and a red-lit great hall before returning to the main classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with long wooden tables and spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the classroom toward the grand spiral staircase at the far end, passing rows of wooden tables

entered.detail: ornate wooden spiral staircase with wrought iron railings leading to upper level
long wooden dining tables with attached benches arranged in rows
tall arched windows with gothic tracery allowing natural light
large dark chalkboard with writing and notices on the wall
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic classroom with high ceilings, wooden paneling, and rows of tables. Natural light streams through large arched windows while the camera approaches a grand spiral staircase at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand spiral staircase with wooden railings

events.description: character begins ascending the spiral staircase
character reaches the top landing, turns around, and begins descending

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase, passing a ghostly figure standing on the landing, then turning to descend

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure in robes standing motionless on the staircase landing

entered.detail: wooden landing at the top of the spiral stairs with a closed door
detailed wooden balustrade with carved posts along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the tight spiral staircase, passing close to a ghostly figure on the landing, then turns and begins descending back down the wooden steps with ornate railings.

events.description: exits the classroom through a wooden doorway into a connecting corridor
begins descending a secondary wooden staircase with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking through arched doorways and down a secondary staircase with stone and wood panel walls

entered.detail: tall gothic arched doorway with heavy wooden doors
straight wooden staircase with carved paneling on the walls
exposed stone masonry wall with wooden wainscoting

segments.scene_description: The character exits the classroom through an arched doorway, traverses a corridor with mixed stone and wood walls, and descends a secondary staircase leading to lower levels.

events.description: lighting shifts to warmer red tones as approaching the great hall entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor passing large medieval tapestries depicting figures and gardens

notable_agents.action: person in dark robes standing near the wall tapestries

entered.detail: large woven tapestries depicting medieval figures and garden scenes covering the walls
long corridor with pointed gothic arches and columns
floor with geometric marble inlay patterns in brown and cream tones

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit corridor lined with elaborate medieval tapestries and gothic arches. The floor features intricate marble patterns, and the lighting gradually shifts to a warm red glow as the character approaches a large hall entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit great hall with vaulted ceilings

events.description: enters the large red-lit hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone arches

agents.ego_description: traversing the expansive red-lit hall with ornate architectural details and large windows

entered.detail: large hall with high vaulted ceiling illuminated by warm red lighting
massive stone gothic arches supporting the ceiling
elaborate hanging light fixture with multiple candles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent great hall bathed in red light, featuring soaring vaulted ceilings supported by stone arches. The space contains wooden benches and large windows, with the character walking toward a distant doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: classroom with professor's desk and celestial globe cabinet

events.description: returns to the main classroom through a heavy wooden door
slows and stops in front of the large wooden cabinet with celestial globe

agents.ego_description: walking toward the front of the classroom and examining the large cabinet with the brass celestial globe on top

notable_agents.action: figure sitting at a desk working in the background

entered.detail: large ornate wooden cabinet with glass doors containing books and artifacts
brass armillary sphere and celestial globe sitting atop the cabinet
large wooden desk with books and lantern in front of the cabinet

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the original classroom through a wooden door and approaches a large cabinet topped with a brass celestial globe. The spiral staircase is visible again in the background on the left as the character stops to examine the professor's desk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sunlit gothic classroom through a series of atmospheric corridors and into a red-lit hall before returning to the starting point. It begins by moving through a spacious room with high ceilings and arched windows, ascending and then descending a tight spiral staircase past a ghostly figure. The camera then exits through an arched doorway, transitioning from the wooden interiors into a stone corridor and down a secondary staircase. As the character traverses a hallway lined with medieval tapestries and marble floors, the lighting shifts from dim shadows to a warm red glow that floods a magnificent great hall with soaring vaulted ceilings. Finally, the movement leads back through a wooden door into the original classroom, passing a brass celestial globe and the spiral staircase to settle at the professor's desk.
